ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Code for the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the division belongs to */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the division in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the division */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., weather station, satellite image, sensor network) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data point collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source used */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "collection_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the data collection method (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "collection_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the collection event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data point being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data point analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to perform the analysis (e.g., statistical, machine learning) */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the analysis */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
